description: Create a 3-level Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) diagram for a 'Legacy ERP System Migration' project. The root node 'Legacy ERP System Migration' should branch into six Level 1 nodes: '1.0 Project Management', '2.0 Requirements Analysis', '3.0 System Design', '4.0 Data Migration', '5.0 Testing & QA', and '6.0 Deployment & Training'. Each Level 1 node must contain three specific Level 2 sub-nodes: 1.0 ('1.1 Project Planning', '1.2 Stakeholder Communication', '1.3 Risk Management'), 2.0 ('2.1 Current State Assessment', '2.2 Gap Analysis', '2.3 Requirements Documentation'), 3.0 ('3.1 Architecture Design', '3.2 Interface Design', '3.3 Security Design'), 4.0 ('4.1 Data Mapping', '4.2 ETL Development', '4.3 Data Validation'), 5.0 ('5.1 Unit Testing', '5.2 Integration Testing', '5.3 UAT'), and 6.0 ('6.1 Production Deployment', '6.2 User Training', '6.3 Post-Go-Live Support'). Save the editable diagram to /home/ga/Diagrams/erp_migration_wbs.eddx and export the image to /home/ga/Diagrams/erp_migration_wbs.png.
